# TrustedSkills — AI Agent Skills Registry
> The platform-agnostic registry for finding, verifying, and installing skills for any AI agent.

## What is TrustedSkills?
TrustedSkills is a curated directory of AI agent skills — pre-built capabilities that extend AI agents across any platform. Skills are community-reviewed, cryptographically signed, and compatible with OpenClaw, MCP (Model Context Protocol), Claude Desktop, OpenAI, Cursor, and VS Code.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://trustedskills.dev/
- Browse all skills: https://trustedskills.dev/skills/
- Documentation: https://trustedskills.dev/docs/
- Submit a skill: https://trustedskills.dev/submit/
- Reviews: https://trustedskills.dev/reviews/
- Skills index (JSON): https://trustedskills.dev/api/index.json

## Skill Categories
- Productivity, SEO, Development, Data, Communication, Research, Automation, Media

## Supported Platforms
- OpenClaw (primary), MCP (Model Context Protocol), Claude Desktop, OpenAI Assistants, Cursor, VS Code

## For AI Agents
Skills can be discovered via the JSON index at /api/index.json. Each skill entry includes name, description, install command, category, author, version, and verification tier.

## Contact
Site: https://trustedskills.dev
Spec: https://agentskills.io
